perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman in a striped sweater sitting on a couch next to a man whose face is blurred. She is gesturing and speaking excitedly to the camera. (2) The scene cuts to various close-ups of the woman acting out different emotions, such as frustration and sadness, frequently touching her hair or face. (3) A shot shows her eating a chicken burger while the man stands in the background with a worried expression. (4) The woman is then shown holding multiple boxes of Pepero snacks, smiling and pointing at the Stray Kids members pictured on the packaging.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic synth-pop music plays continuously. A woman's voice is heard speaking in a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone, occasionally accompanied by sharp 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects. (2) A male voice briefly enters with a lower, calmer tone, responding to the woman's questions. (3) The female voice transitions into a clear, promotional narration as the music maintains a consistent tempo, ending with a final call to action.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) "用《換乘戀愛4》語錄測男友反應" (Functional: Using quotes from 'Transit Love 4' to test boyfriend's reaction). (2) "為什麼要裝得這麼顧家?" (Functional: Why pretend to be so family-oriented?). (3) "超傻眼" and "????" (Decorative: Expressing shock and confusion). (4) "11/8 - 11/11 在華山進行" (Functional: Detailing event dates and location). (5) "Stray Kids 聯名包裝" (Functional: Highlighting the brand collaboration).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Prank Reaction -> Gift Reveal -> Promotional Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 blurred male partner
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a maroon and white striped long-sleeve top and pinkish makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor setting with a white patterned wall and a gray sofa, transitioning to a bright promotional setup with Pepero displays.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video leverages the popularity of the Korean dating show 'Transit Love 4' by using its dialogue to prank a partner, which serves as an engagement hook. This narrative then pivots to an endorsement of LOTTE Pepero snacks, specifically highlighting the Stray Kids collaboration and a pop-up event in Taipei to drive consumer interest and physical attendance.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, verbal mentions of the brand name, and on-screen event logistical information.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of variety-show style text bubbles and Korean cultural references common in K-pop influencer content.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The inclusion of Stray Kids on the packaging is a critical element for high audience retention among fans of the group.
